query:
INSERT INTO availabilitySlots (title, description, startTime, endTime, eventType, location, sessionType, capacity, currentBookings, isFree, price, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('High Heels Technique Masterclass', 'Master the fundamentals of high heels dance with proper technique and style', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY) + INTERVAL 90 MINUTE, 'in-person', 'Studio A, Amsterdam Dance Center', 'group', 12, 5, false, 35.00, NOW(), NOW()),
('Online Choreography Workshop', 'Learn a complete choreography routine from home', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) + INTERVAL 60 MINUTE, 'online', NULL, 'group', 20, 8, false, 25.00, NOW(), NOW()),
('Private 1-on-1 Session', 'Personalized coaching session tailored to your goals', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 5 DAY) + INTERVAL 60 MINUTE, 'online', NULL, 'private', 1, 0, false, 75.00, NOW(), NOW()),
('Beginner Friendly Class', 'Perfect for those just starting their high heels dance journey', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) + INTERVAL 75 MINUTE, 'in-person', 'Studio B, Amsterdam Dance Center', 'group', 15, 3, true, 0.00, NOW(), NOW()),
('Advanced Performance Training', 'Intensive training for experienced dancers preparing for performances', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY) + INTERVAL 120 MINUTE, 'in-person', 'Studio A, Amsterdam Dance Center', 'group', 10, 7, false, 45.00, NOW(), NOW());
command:

('Beginner Friendly Class', 'Perfect for those just starting their high heels dance journey', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) + INTERVAL 75 MINUTE, 'in-person', 'Studio B, Amsterdam Dance Center', 'group', 15, 3, true, 0.00, NOW(), NOW()),
('Advanced Performance Training', 'Intensive training for experienced dancers preparing for performances', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 10 DAY) + INTERVAL 120 MINUTE, 'in-person', 'Studio A, Amsterdam Dance Center', 'group', 10, 7, false, 45.00, NOW(), NOW());
